subpoints: The overlay permission is no longer required for Summaries. Summaries playing in audio-only mode will appear as media sessions in your notification shade.

text: Emoji Removal Exception has been fixed.
subpoints: Exception words to negate emoji removal for certain notifications now work as intended.

text: Quick Settings Tile displaying the wrong icon initially has been fixed.
subpoints: The icon used to display as SpeakThat's wordmark with bugdroid but became the correct icon after being pressed. This error has been corrected.

text: Quick Settings Tile now remains in sync.
subpoints: The tile used to display the wrong state if you toggled SpeakThat from somewhere else. This has been fixed.

text: Fixed an issue with the App Picker's save button being hidden under your keyboard.
subpoints: Particularly frustrating if you were typing in the search bar and then trying to save changes, you previously needed to collapse your keyboard first. Not any more!.
It's small and simple, but gets the job done!
Thanks to ForgeSource for reporting this issue. {time} used to only work in 24-hour mode, and {date} used abbreviated months which were sometiems mispronounced.

text: Added a few options for Android Auto.
subpoints: Android Auto users have a few options inside Behaviour Settings. This gives more control over how audio routing is done when connected to a vehicle.

text: Skip Repeated Prefix no longer fractures sentences.
subpoints: Skipping would occasionally cut off parts of a word (such as the difference between 90% and 95%), the 9 would be cut off for the second readout. This is fixed now.

text: Auto Language is now included in configuration backups.
subpoints: This switch was not included for some reason. That's been fixed now.

text: Summaries are no longer blocked by Conditional Rules.
subpoints: This was especially problematic for manually activated summaries, where the 'Only When Screen Off' rule would prevent it from starting.

text: Conditional Rules now show a confirmation dialog when you have unsaved changes.
subpoints: Another UX bug that wasn't obvious to me but was pointed out in a bug report. Exiting a config screen without saving changes just discarded your modifications. Now it asks you explicitly what you want to do.
